Everyone has a sense of humor. If you don't laugh at jokes, you probably laugh at opinions.
Happiness is the spiritual experience of living every minute with love, grace and gratitude.
Kind words can be short and easy to speak, but their echoes are truly endless.
All animals except man know that the principal business of life is to enjoy it.
I can think of nothing less pleasurable than a life devoted to pleasure.
In youth we run into difficulties. In old age difficulties run into us.
We are shaped and fashioned by what we love.
Fools resist. The wise embrace.
The less you open your heart to others, the more your heart suffers.
Man is affected not by events but by the view he takes of them.
To live outside the law, you must be honest.
Believe you can and you will be halfway there.
Thought is so cunning, so clever, that it distorts everything for its own convenience.
Your work is to discover your work and then, with all your heart, to give yourself to it.
Growth is in a series of mistakes. That's the only way you learn.
The weak can never forgive. Forgiveness is the attribute of the strong.
Intelligence is the ability to adapt to change.
If you chase two rabbits, you catch none.
Numbing the pain for a while will make it worse when you finally feel it.
There are two ways of seeing: with the body and with the soul. The body's sight can sometimes forget, but the soul remembers forever.
To lose your temper is only useful once a year.
Don't measure yourself by what you have accomplished, but by what you should have accomplished with your ability.
You're never too old for anything.
Leaders think and talk about solutions. Followers think and talk about the problems.
Love is not about possession. Love is about appreciation.
Just living is not enough... one must have sunshine, freedom, and a little flower.
Never do things others can do and will do if there are things others cannot do or will not do.
Be the silent watcher of your thoughts and behavior. You are beneath the thinker.
The four P's to success are pressure, persistence, perseverance, and prayer.
Associate with people who are likely to improve you.
People with clear, written goals, accomplish far more in a shorter period of time than people without them could ever imagine.
Great things are not accomplished by those who yield to trends and fads and popular opinion.
If you can't feed a hundred people, then feed just one.
Life has the name of life, but in reality it is death.
Ever tried. Ever failed. No matter. Try Again. Fail again. Fail better.
We are all self-made, but only the successful will admit it.
Before enlightenment; chop wood, carry water. After enlightenment; chop wood, carry water.
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.

Changing minds is harder than finding people who already agree.
Who looks outside, dreams; who looks inside, awakes.
The only person you should try to be better than is the person you were yesterday.
Never put off to tomorrow what you can do to-day.
The great use of life is to spend it for something that will outlast it.
Create with the heart; build with the mind.
Our greatest glory is not in never falling but in rising every time we fall.
Education breeds confidence. Confidence breeds hope. Hope breeds peace.
All life is a manifestation of the spirit, the manifestation of love.
Failure is not fatal, but failure to change might be.
Blessed is he who expects nothing, for he shall never be disappointed.
